action.escalation_action: If there is no response, follow up with the official complaint/reference number and the same evidence packet. Start with: Use GBA/BBMP local corporation channels for streetlight maintenance; use BESCOM if wording indicates outage, wires, transformer, or power-distribution failure.
action.legal_or_rti_action: For a persistent unresolved issue, ask the department for written status, responsible office, and related work/order records for Yamalur. Use RTI only for official records; do not include private account details outside official workflows.
action.message_draft: Hello, I want to report a streetlight issue at Yamalur. Ward/corporation: 46 Yamalur / East. I can share photos, pin/landmark, date/time, and recurrence details. I did not find matching public work/payment rows for this exact issue yet. Please route this to Greater Bengaluru Authority / local city corporation and share the official complaint/reference number.
action.primary_action: File a civic streetlight maintenance complaint for Yamalur; include pole number, photo, and landmark or pin.
what_not_to_claim: claims that a listed work proves the light is fixed
